{"type": "output", "task": "sparql-qa", "output": {"sparql": "PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?club ?foundedYear
WHERE {
  wd:Q2439404 wdt:P527 ?stage.
  ?stage rdfs:label ?stageLabel.
  FILTER (LANG(?stageLabel) = "en" && REGEX(LOWER(?stageLabel), "round 2", "i"))
  ?stage wdt:P527 ?match.
  ?match wdt:P865 ?homeTeam.
  ?match wdt:P863 ?awayTeam.
  ?match wdt:P1255 ?homeGoals.
  ?match wdt:P1256 ?awayGoals.
  BIND(IF(?homeGoals >= ?awayGoals, ?homeTeam, ?awayTeam) AS ?club)
  ?club wdt:P571 ?foundedYear.
  FILTER (isNumeric(?homeGoals) && isNumeric(?awayGoals))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?homeGoals + ?awayGoals)
LIMIT 1", "kg": "wikidata", "selections": "", "result": "Error executing SPARQL query over wikidata:

```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?club ?foundedYear
WHERE {
  wd:Q2439404 wdt:P527 ?stage.
  ?stage rdfs:label ?stageLabel.
  FILTER (LANG(?stageLabel) = "en" && REGEX(LOWER(?stageLabel), "round 2", "i"))
  ?stage wdt:P527 ?match.
  ?match wdt:P865 ?homeTeam.
  ?match wdt:P863 ?awayTeam.
  ?match wdt:P1255 ?homeGoals.
  ?match wdt:P1256 ?awayGoals.
  BIND(IF(?homeGoals >= ?awayGoals, ?homeTeam, ?awayTeam) AS ?club)
  ?club wdt:P571 ?foundedYear.
  FILTER (isNumeric(?homeGoals) && isNumeric(?awayGoals))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?homeGoals + ?awayGoals)
LIMIT 1
```

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?club ?foundedYear
WHERE {
  wd:Q2439404 wdt:P527 ?stage.
  ?stage rdfs:label ?stageLabel.
  FILTER (LANG(?stageLabel) = "en" && REGEX(LOWER(?stageLabel), "round 2", "i"))
  ?stage wdt:P527 ?match.
  ?match wdt:P865 ?homeTeam.
  ?match wdt:P863 ?awayTeam.
  ?match wdt:P1255 ?homeGoals.
  ?match wdt:P1256 ?awayGoals.
  BIND(IF(?homeGoals >= ?awayGoals, ?homeTeam, ?awayTeam) AS ?club)
  ?club wdt:P571 ?foundedYear.
  FILTER (isNumeric(?homeGoals) && isNumeric(?awayGoals))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?homeGoals + ?awayGoals)
LIMIT 1
```

question: When was the club which played in the second round of African Cup of Champions Clubs in 1983 , who scored most goals in 2nd leg , formed
